title: The Prophet ﷺ Made a Prophecy About This River — It's Coming True
_note: CINEMATIC, hook-first (built to stop the 1-2s swipe-away the analytics showed). Footage = rivers/gold/drought/storm (deliberately different look from the AlUla desert video). NO humans (every clip verified by thumbnail), NO recital (Qur'an shown Arabic+English, voice speaks English). Simple thrilling English for non-native viewers. SOURCES VERIFIED: Sahih al-Bukhari 7119 & Sahih Muslim 2894 (the Euphrates uncovering a mountain of gold; people fight, 99 of 100 die; do not take from it); Qur'an 47:18 (the signs of the Hour have begun). ACCURACY GUARD: the gold has NOT been uncovered — the script says so plainly; modern decline of the Euphrates is labelled as science, NOT scripture, and not claimed as fulfilment. Safe-zone captions/sources (top) applied. For #HistoryTikTokContest (1min+).

segments.text: Fourteen hundred years ago, the Prophet Muhammad, peace be upon him, made a prophecy about this exact river. And right now, it is coming true.
This is the Euphrates. One of the oldest rivers on Earth.
He said: the Hour will not come, until the Euphrates dries up, and uncovers a mountain of gold.
And he warned: people will fight over it. Out of every hundred men, ninety-nine will be killed.
Each one thinking to himself: maybe I will be the one who survives.
So he gave a command, across fourteen centuries. If you are there on that day, do not take any of it.
Now here is the part that will give you chills.
The Euphrates is shrinking. Right now. And scientists warn that one day, it could run completely dry.
Be careful here. The gold has not appeared yet. The prophecy is about the day the water finally ends.
But the Prophet, peace be upon him, told us these signs of that day would begin to appear.
Do they wait for the Hour to come on them suddenly? Its signs have already come.
A man in the desert, who could not read or write, named the river and the warning. And we are still watching the water fall.

sources: Sahih al-Bukhari 7119 — the Euphrates will uncover a mountain/treasure of gold; whoever is present should not take from it.
Sahih Muslim 2894 — people will fight over it; 99 of every 100 are killed; each hopes he is the survivor.
Qur'an, Surah Muhammad 47:18 — 'Then do they await except that the Hour should come upon them unexpectedly? But already there have come its indications.' (shown as Arabic + English; NOT recited).

Modern context (clearly separated from scripture): the long-term decline of the Tigris-Euphrates basin (NASA GRACE satellite studies; recent record-low flows). The script does NOT claim the prophecy is fulfilled — the gold has not been uncovered.
VISUALS: all Pexels clips verified by thumbnail to contain NO human faces or bodies.
